name: education_staffing_model_assigns_millhaven_car_fair
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education staffing model assigns millhaven car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Zara Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Zara Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Camila Park
agents.identity: I am Camila Park, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Zara Ibrahim must decide under care vs fairness. What does Zara Ibrahim do?
